column15: wall_condition

column3: Form 1: This form is regarding physical condition of Stormwater Drain (SWD) and adjoining utilities.
column5: 1.1 Your safety is our priority.
column7: 1.3 Enter Right hand side and Left hand side (as per the My Maps)
column8: 1.4 Record your current location, when prompted for selecting between precise and approximate location accuracy, always select precise
column9: _1.4 Record your current location, when prompted for selecting between precise and approximate location accuracy, always select precise_latitude
column10: _1.4 Record your current location, when prompted for selecting between precise and approximate location accuracy, always select precise_longitude
column11: _1.4 Record your current location, when prompted for selecting between precise and approximate location accuracy, always select precise_altitude
column12: _1.4 Record your current location, when prompted for selecting between precise and approximate location accuracy, always select precise_precision
column14: Section 2. The next set of questions will be about Retaining wall.
column15: 2.1 What is the condition of the retaining wall?
column16: 2.2 Height of retaining wall from the road level (approx.) in feet? Ask a person to stand near the wall. If you know their height you can use it to write the approximate height  of the retaining wall.
column17: 2.3 Observe if there is a fence on top of the retaining wall.
column19: 2.5 Please take a picture of the retaining wall.
column20: 2.5 Please take a picture of the retaining wall. _URL
column21: 2.6 Take a photo of the street such that the buildings are visible. Take photo in the direction of your movement.
column22: 2.6 Take a photo of the street such that the buildings are visible. Take photo in the direction of your movement. _URL
column23: Section 3. The next set of questions will be about the condition of bridges on SWD
column27: 3.4 Take a picture of the bridge. A good image will ideally include the top of the bridge, showcasing entry/exit.
column28: 3.4 Take a picture of the bridge. A good image will ideally include the top of the bridge, showcasing entry/exit. _URL
column30: 3.6 Number of Piers? Please specify. If there are no piers, write 0
column31: 3.7 Take a picture of the bridge. A good image will ideally show underside of the bridge with piers.
column32: Section 4. The next set of questions will be about Utility lines and Manholes
column33: 4.1 Are there any electricity lines, transformers outside the SWD?
column34: 4.2 Please take a picture of electricity lines, transformers outside the SWD.
column35: 4.3 Are there cables or lines crossing  the SWD?
column36: 4.4 Please take a picture of utility lines inside the SWD.
column37: 4.4 Please take a picture of utility lines inside the SWD._URL
column38: 4.5 Are there manholes in the SWD?
column39: 4.6 Please take a picture of manhole in the SWD
column40: 4.6 Please take a picture of manhole in the SWD _URL
